experience.title: Server / Bartender
experience.summary: Provide professional service during corporate, private, and large-scale events while working in a fast-paced team environment.
highlights: Managed multiple tasks efficiently in a fast-paced environment
Communicated clearly with guests and team members to support smooth event operations
Built reliability, adaptability, and strong day-to-day teamwork habits

experience.title: Computer Programming & Analysis (Advanced Diploma)
experience.summary: Ontario College Advanced Diploma completed with coursework and projects across full-stack development, data structures, systems analysis, Agile development, databases, machine learning, and mobile development.
highlights: Projects and coursework in C#, Java, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and full-stack development

experience.title: Cybersecurity Coursework and Labs
experience.summary: Hands-on labs covering network defense, risk management, and incident response.
highlights: Analyzed packet captures for DNS, ICMP, and SYN flood anomalies
Produced incident reports and risk assessments aligned to NIST CSF
Used Linux and SQL to audit permissions and query security events

certifications.name: Play It Safe: Manage Security Risks
Connect and Protect: Networks and Network Security
